author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Extracted WalkthroughCore into config_registry.rs with all shared state and methods (new, total_screens, is_preset_screen, is_confirm_screen, move_up, move_down, cycle_value, confirm, go_back, apply_preset_selections, build_config, options_for_key). Config uses it directly via type alias. Init wraps it with alias_selected and shell_config_file, overriding move_up/move_down for alias screen handling. Draw functions remain in their respective files. All 1665 tests pass.
